pageContext.name: Millennium Falcon 3oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: This is no hunk of junk! The Corellian freighter, the Millennium Falcon, is shown in stunning detail on this weighty 3oz fine silver-shaped coin–a true rarity.  The level of detail featured on this coin is stunning–the iconic ship has been brought to life as a work of art created via specialist minting techniques. The coin comes in a round acrylic capsule, which sits snugly in plush velvet inside a sturdy coin case. The Certificate of Authenticity also sits within this case, packaged in a custom-made Star Wars-themed box.  It is the perfect package for any fan!
